# First AI Movers — Article Archive

> The canonical, open-access text archive of all First AI Movers articles by Dr. Hernani Costa. 770 original articles on AI strategy, EU AI Act compliance, AI governance, agentic systems, and responsible AI adoption for European SMEs. Published February 2025–April 2026. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.

## Author

Dr. Hernani Costa — PhD in Computational Linguistics (University of Malaga), 25+ years in technology and AI systems. Founder of First AI Movers and Core Ventures. Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. ORCID: 0000-0002-6813-4641.

## Key Files

- [README](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/README.md): Full project overview, topics covered, usage instructions
- [Article Index](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/index.json): Machine-readable catalog of all articles with title, date, tags, and canonical URL
- [Author Bio](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/ABOUT.md): Dr. Hernani Costa's credentials, affiliations, and verified profiles
- [Author Structured Data](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/hernanicosta.json): Schema.org Person entity in JSON-LD format
- [Citation](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Machine-readable citation metadata (CFF format)
- [License](https://github.com/First-AI-Movers/articles/blob/main/LICENSE): Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International
- [Sitemap](https://articles.firstaimovers.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap. Advertises canonical article URLs on radar/insights/newsletter/voices subdomains; `articles.firstaimovers.com` itself serves this repo as a raw-data mirror for LLM and programmatic consumption.
- [Atom Feed](https://articles.firstaimovers.com/feed.xml): Atom 1.0 feed of the 50 most-recent articles for poll-based discovery by LLM agents, feed readers, and automation tools. Updated on every article push.
- [Full Corpus](https://articles.firstaimovers.com/llms-full.txt): Single-file concatenation of every article's full text — newest first, with title/date/URL/tags headers — for bulk LLM ingestion. CC BY 4.0, attribution required.

## Topics

AI strategy, EU AI Act compliance, AI governance, European SME AI adoption, agentic AI systems, MCP protocols, RAG architectures, AI coding stacks, Claude Code, prompt engineering, fractional CTO frameworks, sovereign AI, AI literacy, responsible AI, healthtech AI, renewable energy AI, digital transformation.

## Platforms

- Newsletter: https://firstaimovers.com
- Radar: https://radar.firstaimovers.com
- Insights: https://insights.firstaimovers.com
- Dev.to: https://dev.to/dr_hernani_costa
- Medium: https://medium.com/@firstaimovers
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/hernani-costa-ai-ceo-firstaimovers
